description: Module add scheduled — customer added Newsletter from the dashboard, effective next billing date; quotes paid-setup-so-far, current monthly, new monthly, and the extra setup charge that lands on the effective-date invoice

expected.subject: Got it — Newsletter scheduled for 2026-06-01
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Quick confirmation — your module change is queued.

You are ADDING: Newsletter

Effective from: 2026-06-01

Where you stand on money:

  • Setup paid to date:      £129 (non-refundable)
  • Current monthly:         £19/mo
  • New monthly from 2026-06-01: £25/mo
  • Extra one-off setup on
    2026-06-01 invoice:  +£39

What happens between now and then:
  • Your subscription stays the same until 2026-06-01.
  • On 2026-06-01: your next invoice picks up the
    extra one-off setup (above) PLUS the new monthly rate.
  • Newsletter activates the same day so you can start
    using it straight away.

The setup figure above is what you have already paid to
build the site. It is not refunded under any module change
or cancellation — that work has been delivered.

Changed your mind? Just open your dashboard and remove the
pending change. Anything done by you before the effective
date is reversible from there.

— ModuForge
